zh.lifeSummary: 當Gwenllian Norreys於1330年出生在威爾士格拉莫爾根利時，她的父親Robert Norreys31歲，母親Mrs. Robert Norreys27歲。她於從1345年到1350年與Tomkin De Turberville在英國威爾斯格拉莫爾根結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於大約1370年在英國威爾斯格拉莫爾根享年41歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Gwenllian Norreys于1330年出生在威尔士格拉莫爾根利时，她的父亲Robert Norreys31岁，母亲Mrs. Robert Norreys27岁。她于从1345年到1350年与Tomkin De Turberville在英国威尔斯格拉莫爾根结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于大约1370年在英国威尔斯格拉莫爾根享年41岁。

nameMeanings.name: Norreys
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Norris
meanings: habitational name from Middle English norreis, noreis, norais ‘northerner’ (Anglo-Norman French noreis), used both of Norwegians and of inhabitants of northern England and Scotland.
from the Middle English personal name Norreis, derived from norreis ‘northerner’.

nameMeanings.name: Gwenllian
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Traditional: from gwen, the feminine form of gwyn ‘white, fair; blessed, holy’ ( see Gwen ) + lliant ‘flood, flow’ (probably in the transferred sense ‘foamy’ or ‘white’, referring to a pale complexion).

en.lifeSummary: When Gwenllian Norreys was born in 1330, in Penllyn, Glamorgan, Wales, her father, Robert Norreys, was 31 and her mother, Mrs. Robert Norreys, was 27. She married Tomkin De Turberville from 1345 to 1350, in Glamorgan, Wales, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 1 daughter. She died about 1370, in Glamorgan, Wales, United Kingdom, at the age of 41.

fr.of Tythegston, Glamorgan, Wales: Tythegston, Glamorgan, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Gwenllian Norreys est née en 1330, à Penllyn, Glamorgan, Galles, son père, Robert Norreys, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Mrs. Robert Norreys, avait 27 ans. Elle a épousé Tomkin De Turberville du 1345 au 1350, à Glamorgan, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée environ 1370, à Glamorgan, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 41 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Gwenllian Norreys 1330 in Penllyn, Glamorgan, Wales geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Robert Norreys 31 und ihre Mutter Mrs. Robert Norreys 27. Sie hat von 1345 bis 1350 in Glamorgan, Wales, United Kingdom Tomkin De Turberville geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb um 1370 im Alter von 41 Jahren in Glamorgan, Wales, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Gwenllian Norreys è nata il nel 1330 nel Penllyn, Glamorgan, Galles, sua padre, Robert Norreys, aveva 31 anni e sua madre, Mrs. Robert Norreys, aveva 27 anni. Lei sposato Tomkin De Turberville da 1345 a 1350, nel Glamorgan, Galles, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 1 figlia. Morì circa 1370, nel Glamorgan, Galles, Regno Unito, all'età di 41 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Gwenllian Norreysが1330年にウェールズグラモーガンペンリンで生まれた時，父Robert Norreysは31歳，母Mrs. Robert Norreysは27歳であった。から1345年まで1350年にイギリスウェールズグラモーガンでTomkin De Turbervilleと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は約1370年にイギリスウェールズグラモーガンで41歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Gwenllian Norreys(이)가 1330년 웨일스 글램르건 펜린에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Robert Norreys(은)는 31세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mrs. Robert Norreys(은)는 27세였다. 그녀는 1345년 부터 1350년 까지 영국 웨일스 글램르건에서 Tomkin De Turberville(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1370년 영국 웨일스 글램르건에서 41세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Gwenllian Norreys nasceu em 1330, em Penllyn, Glamorgan, Gales, seu pai, Robert Norreys, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Mrs. Robert Norreys, tinha 27 anos. Ela casou-se com Tomkin De Turberville de 1345 a 1350, em Glamorgan, Gales, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu aproximadamente 1370, em Glamorgan, Gales, United Kingdom, com 41 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Gwenllian Norreys родилась в 1330 г. в местности пенллин, глэморган, Уэльс, её отцу по имени Robert Norreys было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Mrs. Robert Norreys, 27. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Tomkin De Turberville с 1345 по 1350 в местности глэморган, Уэльс, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла около 1370 г. в местности глэморган, Уэльс, Великобритания в возрасте 41 год.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Gwenllian Norreys nació en 1330, en Penllyn, Glamorgan, Gales, su papá, Robert Norreys, tenía 31 años y su mamá, Mrs. Robert Norreys, tenía 27 años. Se casó con Tomkin De Turberville desde 1345 hasta 1350, en Glamorgan, Gales, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 1 hija. Murió aproximadamente 1370, en Glamorgan, Gales, Reino Unido, a la edad de 41 años.
